revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:一白水星]]
{{More citations needed|date=December 2018|qq=}}
{| class="floatright wikitable" style="text-align:center; font-family:serif;" |+ Post-Heaven Lo Shu Square |- | 4 || 9 || 2 |- | 3 || 5 || 7 |- | 8 || style="background-color:#FF80C0; font-weight:bold;" | 1 || 6 |}
{| class="floatright wikitable" style="text-align:center; font-family:serif;" |+ When Ippaku is in the center |- | 9 || 5 || 7 |- | 8 || style="background-color:#FF80C0; font-weight:bold;" | 1 || 3 |- | 4 || 6 || 2 |}
'''Ippaku Suisei''' (一白水星) is one of the {{ill|Nine Stars|ja|九星|1=Nine Stars|2=ja|3=九星|lt=Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nine Stars|qq=}} used in {{ill|Calendar|en|Calendar|qid=Q12132|lt=calendars|1=Calendar}} and {{ill|Divination|en|Divination|qid=Q1043197|lt=fortune-telling|1=Divination}}. In the Post-Heaven Lo Shu Square, it occupies the northern position.
Among the Nine Stars, it is the only one associated with the Water element in the {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}}.
In the daily cycle of the Nine Stars, the day closest to the {{ill|Winter solstice|en|Winter solstice|qid=Q207932|lt=Winter solstice|1=Winter solstice}} that falls on a Kanoto day is designated as an Ippaku day, marking the transition from Yin to Yang. At that time, the final day of the previous Yin cycle and the first day of the new Yang cycle both belong to Ippaku, making it appear for two consecutive days.
== Attributes == * {{ill|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|en|Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|qid=Q218652|lt=Five Elements (Wuxing)|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)}} - {{ill|Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|qq=}} * {{ill|Bagua|en|Bagua|qid=Q340846|lt=Bagua|1=Bagua}} - {{ill|Kǎn (Bagua)|ja|坎|lt=Kǎn (坎)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kǎn (Bagua)}} * {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} - {{ill|Mizunoe (壬)|ja|壬|zh|壬|gan|壬|hak|Ngìm (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoe|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|vi|Nhâm (Thiên can)|za|Nyaemz (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Jîm (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|壬 (天干)|zh|壬|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}}, {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} * {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} - {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|qid=Q721997|lt=Rat (子)|1=Rat (zodiac)}} * Season - Winter * Direction - North * Month - December * Time - 23:00–1:00 * Number - One, Six * Color - Black * Taste - Salty
== Symbolic Meanings == * Beginning, relationships, difficulties, sorrow * Caves, hidden places, middle-aged men, water, fluidity, patience, contemplation, secrecy, exploitation, health fortune, subordinate fortune * Diseases ** Kidneys, diabetes, nasal cavity, ear disorders, edema, rashes, gynecological diseases, urinary tract, genitals, hemorrhoids, anus, etc.
== Relationships with Other Stars == * Generating Cycle (相生) - {{ill|Sanpeki Mokusei|ja|三碧木星|1=Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanpeki Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Third Blue Wood Star|qq=}} (Water generates Wood), {{ill|Shiroku Mokusei|ja|四緑木星|1=Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroku Mokusei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fourth Green Wood Star|qq=}} (Water generates Wood), {{ill|Roppaku Kinsei|1=Sixth White Metal Star|ja|六白金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Roppaku Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Sixth White Metal Star|qq=}} (Metal generates Water), {{ill|Shichiseki Kinsei|1=Seventh Red Metal Star|ja|七赤金星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shichiseki Kinsei|13=User:Immanuelle/Seventh Red Metal Star|qq=}} (Metal generates Water) * Overcoming Cycle (相克) - {{ill|Nikoku Dosei|ja|二黒土星|1=Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nikoku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Second Black Earth Star|qq=}} (Earth overcomes Water), {{ill|Goō Dosei|1=Fifth Yellow Earth Star|ja|五黄土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goō Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Fifth Yellow Earth Star|qq=}} (Earth overcomes Water), {{ill|Happaku Dosei|1=Eighth White Earth Star|ja|八白土星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Happaku Dosei|13=User:Immanuelle/Eighth White Earth Star|qq=}} (Earth overcomes Water), {{ill|Kyūshi Kasei|1=Ninth Purple Fire Star|ja|九紫火星|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyūshi Kasei|13=User:Immanuelle/Ninth Purple Fire Star|qq=}} (Water overcomes Fire) * Harmonious Relationship (比和) - Ippaku Suisei
== Years in Which Ippaku Suisei Occupies the Center == Years in which the remainder when divided by 9 is 1 are Ippaku Suisei years.
‥‥- {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}} - {{ill|1954|en|1954|qid=Q18581|lt=1954|1=1954}} - {{ill|1963|en|1963|qid=Q2755|lt=1963|1=1963}} - {{ill|1972|en|1972|qid=Q2476|lt=1972|1=1972}} - {{ill|1981|en|1981|qid=Q2437|lt=1981|1=1981}} - {{ill|1990|en|1990|qid=Q2064|lt=1990|1=1990}} - {{ill|1999|en|1999|qid=Q2091|lt=1999|1=1999}} - {{ill|2008|en|2008|qid=Q2004|lt=2008|1=2008}} - {{ill|2017|en|2017|qid=Q25290|lt=2017|1=2017}} - {{ill|2026|en|2026|qid=Q49613|lt=2026|1=2026}} - {{ill|2035|en|2035|qid=Q12127|lt=2035|1=2035}} - {{ill|2044|en|2044|qid=Q49919|lt=2044|1=2044}} - {{ill|2053|en|2053|qid=Q49928|lt=2053|1=2053}} - {{ill|2062|en|2062|qid=Q1046496|lt=2062|1=2062}} - {{ill|2071|en|2071|qid=Q890598|lt=2071|1=2071}} -‥‥ == Nine Stars Comparison Chart ==
